◎译　　名　BBC自然世界.印度毒蛇之谜
◎片　　名　The King Cobra and I
◎年　　代　2005
◎产　　地　英国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语
◎IMDb评分  7.8/10 from 9 users

◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users

◎片　　长　50分钟

◎简　　介  

　　Documentary about Rom Whitaker, who is organising the fight to save the threatened King Cobra, the world's largest venomous snake. He's trying to set up the world's first King Cobra sanctuary, and with his beloved captive kings, Elvis and Priscilla, he's trying to breed babies to release back into the Indian jungle.
